title: Sterling Research Findings
description: Validates structured output from all Sterling research workers. Every finding must have a sourced fact with minimum detail. Findings about pipelines must name the pipeline; findings about APIs must include the API name.

fact.description: One atomic claim. Must be specific — no generic statements like 'the system has many features'.

source.description: Tool or source that produced this data (e.g. 'cdt:get-pipeline', 'atlassian:get-jira-issue'). Cannot be empty.

not_found.description: What was searched for but not found. Each entry must describe what was searched.

raw_data.description: Key structured data — pipeline IDs, config values, API names, property keys.
